confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

data_description.pin: 4-digit PIN for heater authentication. Factory default is 1234. If you changed the PIN in the heater app, enter your custom PIN here.

user.description: Select your diesel heater from the list.

manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your heater (e.g., A4:C1:37:24:B8:64). You can find this in the Bluetooth logs or using a BLE scanner app.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Please use format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF

data_description.pin: 4-digit PIN for heater authentication. Factory default is 1234. Changes require integration reload.
data_description.preset_away_temp: Temperature for Away preset (anti-freeze protection). Default: 8°C.
data_description.preset_comfort_temp: Temperature for Comfort preset (normal heating). Default: 21°C.
